UserPromptSubmit.command: sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" agents user-prompt-submit'

PreToolUse.command: sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" agents pre-tool-use'

PermissionRequest.command: sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" agents permission-request'

Stop.command: sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" agents stop'
